personal.name: Jordan Taylor
personal.title: Full Stack Developer
personal.summary: Full stack developer with 5+ years of experience building fast, accessible web apps with React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms. Strong track record of shipping polished products, improving performance, and turning ambiguous business needs into reliable user experiences.

experience.description: Lead frontend development for a B2B analytics platform used by operations teams to monitor revenue, onboarding, and retention metrics.
achievements: Reduced dashboard load time by 42% by splitting heavy routes, optimizing data fetching, and removing unused client bundles.
Built a reusable component system with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Storybook that cut new feature UI work by roughly 30%.
Partnered with product and design to launch self-serve reporting tools used by 2,000+ weekly active users.

experience.description: Built customer-facing web applications, internal admin tools, and API integrations for a SaaS workflow automation product.
achievements: Created a Next.js onboarding flow that increased trial activation by 18%.
Designed REST API endpoints in Node.js and PostgreSQL for billing, permissions, and document workflows.
Improved test coverage across critical checkout and account flows with Playwright and Jest.

experience.description: Delivered websites and small business tools for local service providers, creators, and online stores.
achievements: Launched 12 responsive marketing sites with SEO basics, analytics, and contact form automation.
Helped clients migrate from legacy page builders to modern React and static site workflows.

projects.name: ResumeForge
projects.description: Open-source resume builder with live preview, JSON import/export, and PDF generation.

projects.name: MetricPulse
projects.description: Analytics dashboard that combines product, revenue, and support metrics into one executive view.

projects.name: LocalLaunch Kit
projects.description: Reusable starter kit for small business landing pages with CMS-ready sections and contact automation.

achievements.title: Employee Impact Award
achievements.description: Recognized for leading the frontend performance initiative that improved customer retention signals.

achievements.title: Top 10 Hackathon Finalist
achievements.description: Built a prototype AI support triage tool in 48 hours with a four-person team.

volunteer.description: Help maintain civic technology projects, review pull requests, and mentor new contributors.
